summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EasyLeaz automotive leasing platform. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Hero title shows 'UPDATED TITLE FOR TESTING' instead of expected 'LEASING AUTOMOBILE PREMIUM À GENÈVE' due to CMS update during testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Hero section
Navbar sticky with blur effect and smooth scroll navigation
Vehicle cards display with brand, model, year, mileage, fuel, price, monthly_payment
Leasing form submits successfully via POST /api/leasing-requests
Contact section shows phone, location, Instagram, WhatsApp
Admin vehicle CRUD: add, edit, delete vehicles
Admin CMS editor: sections are expandable and editable
Admin leasing requests viewer shows submitted requests
Backend API: POST /api/leasing-requests creates a request
Backend API: GET /api/cms returns all CMS sections
Backend API: PUT /api/cms/{section_key} updates content with x-admin-token header
All admin endpoints properly secured with token authentication
Vehicle management with full CRUD operations
